description.value: Aura moderate divination, evocation, and necromancy; CL 7th; Slot armor; Price 5,380 gp; Weight 40 lbs. DESCRIPTION This blue-white +1 deathless chainmail is made of an intricate pattern of light and dark links that form a spiral-shaped design on the armor’s chest. The wearer can use detect undead, disrupt undead, and light each once per day CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells death ward, detect undead, disrupt undead, light; Price 2,840 gp
